title: <div><tt>| `Surface Layer` | User-facing visuals | Clean, stylized display of pr
content:
| `Surface Layer` | User-facing visuals | Clean, stylized display of projects, threads, rituals |
| `Logic Layer` | System commands, rituals | Handles all prefix actions, recursion, archive, memory |
| `Symbol Layer` | Glyphs, leetSpeak, color codes | Artistic indicators of system status, project state |
| `Data Layer` | Canonical names, safe logic | File paths, version tracking, ID resolution |

---

## PRIMARY UI COMPONENTS

- **Dashboard View**
- Panels = Projects, Rituals, Peers
- Graph logic: Bloom → Threads → Outputs

- **Terminal View (`KONS0L`)**
- Typable commands (e.g. `::deploy QUEER`)
- Live feedback + echo from 4N3 or ARKIV subsystems

- **Object Drawer**
- Where system "objects" live:
- Prompts, poems, rituals, raw ideas
